name: TUTOR PERINI CORP
summary: Tutor Perini Corp (TPC) is a construction company that provides general contracting, construction management, and design-build services. The company operates across civil, building, and specialty construction segments, serving clients in transportation, water, power, and building infrastructure markets. Specific projects include highways, bridges, tunnels, mass transit, and other public and private construction projects.
